since_last: 10% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.26%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 10% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -2.14% · Gold -2.26% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 10% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.26%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.26%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.82%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +10.25%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +10.25%, DV +4.90%, BIDU +4.79%, PUBM +2.93%, EQIX +0.16%. Laggards: RXRX -5.21%, CEVA -4.79%, MRVL -4.39%, INTC -4.33%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.07% at $149.58
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.07% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
